description: After winning a championship, a team needs to design and order championship rings for all players and staff.

nodes.task_description: Work with a jewelry company to design the championship ring.

expected_outcome.expected: A final design for the ring is approved.

nodes.task_description: Get the ring size for every eligible player and staff member.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent collects all the necessary ring sizes.

nodes.task_description: Place the order for the rings with the jewelry company.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent successfully places the bulk order for the rings.
